properties.name: LYNX
properties.description: 3-piece set effect: Wearer's HP Treatment Efficiency +{heal_up:0%}. After the wearer gives HP treatment to an allied target, that target also gains {1-dmg_taken_down:0%} DMG Reduction against all types of DMG for {duration}s. If the said treatment exceeds the target's Max HP, the target gains {1-dmg_taken_down2:0%} DMG Reduction against all types of DMG. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.
